positive: A highly detailed, stylized celestial tapestry featuring interlocking geometric shapes, crescent moons, abstract constellations, and blooming cosmic nebulae. The style is a blend of vintage occult engravings and clean, modern vector illustration. Composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, suitable for a repeating print pattern. Use strong, deep silhouettes contrasting against a luminous background. Color palette should be limited to deep indigo, sapphire blue, muted gold, and off-white, emphasizing high contrast for print transfer. Intricate linework, clean edges, symmetrical layout, ethereal, cosmic geometry.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, noise, messy, amateur, bad anatomy, extra limbs, out of frame, solid color fill, grainy
